financeTiers.label: Reported international DRR-related ODA
financeTiers.coverage: Donor-reported disbursements and commitments by recipient, donor, sector, and latest available CRS year.
financeTiers.caveat: International public finance layer for donor and recipient screening.

financeTiers.label: Project finance signals
sources: Green Climate Fund Open Data Library
financeTiers.coverage: Full project commitments, GCF funding, co-finance, public/private sector tags, and country-linked project examples.
financeTiers.caveat: Project totals are discovery signals, and multi-country projects are linked to each listed country.

financeTiers.label: Humanitarian response funding
financeTiers.coverage: Current-year humanitarian funding by destination country, useful for post-event response pressure.
financeTiers.caveat: Response finance is shown as a separate humanitarian context layer.

financeTiers.label: Domestic, private, and mainstreamed DRR
financeTiers.coverage: Can be added where governments, donors, and project sponsors publish budget tags, activity records, or component-level documents.
financeTiers.caveat: Country evidence layer for deeper finance review with confidence labels.
